message:
fix(doctor): add Dolt backend detection to all fix functions (gt-doctor-dolt-fix)

Doctor fix functions hardcoded SQLite paths (beads.db) and used direct
sql.Open("sqlite3", ...) calls, causing "is a directory" errors when
the backend is Dolt. This builds on the bd-m2jr factory fix by adding
Dolt-awareness to all remaining fix functions:

- validation.go: OrphanedDependencies and ChildParentDependencies skip
  for Dolt (raw SQL queries not backend-portable)
- permissions.go: Detect database type from config and handle Dolt
  directories (0700) vs SQLite files (0600)
- recovery.go: Skip SQLite-specific corruption recovery for Dolt
- repo_fingerprint.go: Use config-aware database path resolution and
  handle directory removal for Dolt databases
- sync.go: DBJSONLSync skips for Dolt (sync is database-native)
- migrate.go: Follow .beads redirects via resolveBeadsDir

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
